info.title: StockTwits API
info.description: The StockTwits API provides access to the StockTwits social network for investors and traders. It allows developers to access streams of messages (twits), user profiles, trending symbols, and more. StockTwits is a social media platform designed for sharing ideas between investors, traders, and entrepreneurs.

get.description: Returns the most recent messages for the specified symbol. This stream includes all messages that contain the specified symbol, including those from private accounts if the authenticated user follows them.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Ticker symbol, e.g. AAPL, TSLA

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID greater than the specified ID

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID less than or equal to the specified ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (default 30, max 30)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter messages by links, charts, or videos

200.description: Successful response with messages for the symbol

get.description: Returns the most recent messages for the specified user.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID or username

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID greater than the specified ID

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID less than or equal to the specified ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (default 30, max 30)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter messages by links, charts, or videos

200.description: Successful response with messages for the user

get.description: Returns the most recent messages from the authenticated user's home stream, including messages from users and symbols they follow.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID greater than the specified ID

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID less than or equal to the specified ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (default 30, max 30)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter messages by links, charts, or videos

200.description: Successful response with home stream messages

get.description: Returns the most recent messages from users the authenticated user follows.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID greater than the specified ID

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID less than or equal to the specified ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (default 30, max 30)

get.description: Returns the most recent messages with trending sentiment on StockTwits.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID greater than the specified ID

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID less than or equal to the specified ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (default 30, max 30)

get.description: Returns the most recent messages across StockTwits.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID greater than the specified ID

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID less than or equal to the specified ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (default 30, max 30)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter messages by links, charts, or videos

200.description: Successful response with all stream messages

get.description: Returns the most recent messages for the symbols in the specified watchlist.

parameters.name: watchlist_id
parameters.description: The watchlist ID

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID greater than the specified ID

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Returns results with an ID less than or equal to the specified ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (default 30, max 30)

get.description: Returns the specified message by ID.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: The message ID

post.description: Creates a new message (twit) for the authenticated user.

body.description: The body of the message. Must include a $TICKER symbol (e.g. $AAPL). Max 1000 characters.

in_reply_to_message_id.description: The ID of the message being replied to

chart.description: A chart image to attach to the message

post.description: Likes a message for the authenticated user.

id.description: The ID of the message to like

post.description: Unlikes a previously liked message for the authenticated user.

id.description: The ID of the message to unlike

get.description: Search for symbols and users on StockTwits.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query (prefix match for symbols and usernames)

get.description: Search for symbols on StockTwits.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query for symbol lookup

get.description: Search for users on StockTwits.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query for user lookup

get.description: Returns the list of trending symbols on StockTwits, based on message volume.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of trending symbols to return (default 30, max 30)

get.description: Returns the list of trending equity symbols on StockTwits.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of trending symbols to return (default 30, max 30)

200.description: Successful response with trending equity symbols

get.description: Returns the list of users the specified user is following.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID or username

200.description: Successful response with list of followed users

get.description: Returns the list of users following the specified user.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID or username

200.description: Successful response with list of followers

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID or username to follow

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID or username to unfollow

get.description: Returns all watchlists for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new watchlist for the authenticated user.
Updates the name of an existing watchlist.

parameters.name: watchlist_id
parameters.description: The watchlist ID

name.description: The new name of the watchlist

parameters.name: watchlist_id
parameters.description: The watchlist ID to delete

post.description: Adds symbols to an existing watchlist.

parameters.name: watchlist_id
parameters.description: The watchlist ID

symbols.description: Comma-separated list of ticker symbols to add (e.g. AAPL,TSLA,GOOG)

post.description: Removes symbols from an existing watchlist.

parameters.name: watchlist_id
parameters.description: The watchlist ID

symbols.description: Comma-separated list of ticker symbols to remove

get.description: Returns the specified watchlist with its symbols.

parameters.name: watchlist_id
parameters.description: The watchlist ID

get.description: Verifies the authenticated user's credentials and returns their profile information.

post.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile information.

get.description: Returns a list of message IDs that have been deleted since the specified ID.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returns deleted message IDs greater than this ID

200.description: Successful response with deleted message IDs

get.description: Returns a list of user IDs that have been deleted since the specified ID.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Returns deleted user IDs greater than this ID

200.description: Successful response with deleted user IDs

oauth2.description: StockTwits uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication. Some endpoints are available without authentication using just an access_token query parameter.

accessToken.name: access_token
accessToken.description: Access token passed as a query parameter. Can be an application-level token for public endpoints or a user-level OAuth token for authenticated endpoints.

more.description: Whether there are more results available

since.description: The ID to use for the since parameter to get newer results

max.description: The ID to use for the max parameter to get older results

created_at.description: Timestamp when the message was created

avatar_url.description: URL to the user's avatar image

avatar_url_ssl.description: HTTPS URL to the user's avatar image

official.description: Whether the user is an official/verified account

watchlist_stocks_count.description: Number of stocks in the user's watchlist

is_following.description: Whether the authenticated user is following this symbol

has_pricing.description: Whether pricing data is available for this symbol

watchlist_count.description: Number of users who have this symbol in their watchlist

static.description: Whether the watchlist is a default/static list

tags.name: Streams
tags.description: Stream endpoints return collections of messages (twits). Streams can be filtered by symbol, user, trending, etc.

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: Message endpoints for creating, viewing, liking, and managing individual messages (twits).

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Search endpoints for finding symbols and users on StockTwits.

tags.name: Trending
tags.description: Trending endpoints return currently popular symbols based on message volume.

tags.name: Graph (Social)
tags.description: Social graph endpoints for viewing followers and following lists.

tags.name: Friendships
tags.description: Friendship management endpoints for following and unfollowing users.

tags.name: Watchlists
tags.description: Watchlist management endpoints for creating and managing symbol watchlists.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Account management endpoints for verifying and updating user profiles.

tags.name: Deletions
tags.description: Deletion tracking endpoints for finding messages and users that have been removed.
